overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval village at dusk, then proceeding along a decorated dirt path lined with wooden fences, torch posts, and red banner gates. The scene transitions from a populated settlement to an open rural countryside with fields.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village settlement with wooden huts

agents.ego_description: walking through the village settlement past wooden huts and villagers

entered.detail: traditional wooden hut with thatched roof and warm interior lighting
rustic wooden fence lining the dirt path
tall wooden post with burning torch providing warm light

segments.scene_description: Walking through a medieval village settlement at dusk, passing traditional wooden huts and villagers. The dirt path is lined with wooden fences and illuminated by torchlight, with the first banner gate visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: decorated rural path with red banner gates

events.description: exits village settlement and enters decorated rural path with banner gates

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path passing through wooden gates decorated with red banners

entered.detail: wooden frame structure with hanging red triangular banners and torch mounts
rustic wooden fence appearing on the left side of the path
open grassy field visible beyond the left fence

segments.scene_description: Having left the village behind, the path continues through a series of wooden gates adorned with red banners. The surroundings transition from built structures to open countryside, with grassy fields becoming visible beyond the fences.

events.description: path opens up revealing expansive fields on both sides with distant tree line

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open path through the countryside as dusk deepens

entered.detail: expansive grassy field stretching to the horizon on the right side

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide rural landscape with expansive fields visible on both sides under a deep blue dusk sky. The character continues walking through the series of banner gates as the surroundings become more open and natural.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling medieval settlement into an expansive, open rural landscape at dusk. It begins by weaving through a village of traditional wooden huts and villagers, where the dirt path is illuminated by flickering torchlight and lined with wooden fences. As the camera moves forward, the built structures fade away and the path transitions through a series of wooden gates adorned with red banners. The scene then opens further, shifting from the enclosed village perimeter to wide grassy fields that stretch out on both sides. Finally, the surroundings become entirely natural and open under a deep blue dusk sky as the character continues walking through the remaining banner gates.
